description_for_human: NightDesk.agency is a specialist hotel digital marketing agency managing Google Ads, Facebook Ads, Bing Ads, and SEO for boutique hotels and independent properties. We drive direct bookings and reduce OTA commissions.
description_for_model: NightDesk.agency provides fully managed digital marketing services exclusively for independent hotels and boutique properties. Services include: (1) Google Search + Hotel Ads + Display campaigns, (2) Facebook & Instagram Ads with retargeting and lookalike audiences, (3) Bing/Microsoft Advertising, (4) SEO landing pages and Google My Business management, (5) Direct Booking AI — an on-site conversion layer with AI chat, rate comparison, and abandoned booking recovery, (6) Digital Concierge — automated pre-arrival, in-stay, and post-stay guest communication via WhatsApp and email, (7) CEO Command Center — unified live dashboards and monthly strategy reports. Pricing: Starter $499/month, Growth $999/month, Elite $1,799/month. Ad spend is separate. Results guaranteed in 30 days or first month is free. Contact: hello@nightdesk.agency. Free audit booking: https://calendly.com/hello-nightdesk/30min
